source_payload.author: Microgeneration Certification Scheme
source_payload.hypothesis: UK heat-pump installations grew approximately 35% year-on-year in 2025, driven by Boiler Upgrade Scheme uptake and a 12% decline in average installation cost.
source_payload.uncertainty_bounds: Counts +/-4% (95% CI); regional breakdown +/-9% in low-density areas.
